faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Answers to frequently asked AI questions

items.question: What is LeftFlow?
items.answer: LeftFlow is an AI automation agency offering content generation, AI agents, workflow automation, and LLM development services. Our goal is to save you time and boost efficiency.

items.question: What problems can your AI solutions solve?
items.answer: We provide solutions across customer service automation, data analysis, content generation, business process optimization, and many more areas.

items.question: Is LeftFlow suitable for businesses of all sizes?
items.answer: Absolutely! We offer customized AI solutions for businesses of every size, from startups to enterprise organizations.

items.question: Why are RAG or LLM development valuable?
items.answer: RAG and LLM technologies transform your company data into intelligent assistants, improving customer experience and increasing operational efficiency.

items.question: How much does LeftFlow cost?
items.answer: We customize every project to fit your needs. During our free discovery call, we'll recommend a solution that works within your budget.

partner.name: Amsterdam Tech
partner.description: Woolf-accredited, EU-recognized higher education institution. QS 5★ online rating · 30 years of educational heritage · Amsterdam, NL

newHero.title: A team that actually does the AI work.
newHero.subtitle: We draft an AI strategy tailored to your company, then the same team builds the systems and runs them monthly. For mid-market and enterprise companies, in partnership with Amsterdam Tech.

twoLines.title: First the strategy, then the delivery.
twoLines.subtitle: Leftflow runs on two distinct lines. Advisory draws your roadmap; Systems puts it into production. You can pick either one, or both.

advisory.title: Roadmaps, decisions, board-ready strategy.
advisory.description: 3-month fixed-scope strategy packages: process inventory, AI opportunity map, pilot project definitions, budget model and investment committee presentation. Implementation is not included here — the goal is to get crystal clear on what to do.

systems.title: Live AI agents and running systems.
systems.description: Productized AI agent packages plus custom builds. We ship in 4–10 weeks and run monthly operations and maintenance. If you already have a strategy we execute it; if not, start with Advisory.

dualCta.title: Which fits you?
dualCta.advisoryDesc: One of our Advisory packages gives you a roadmap, pilot project definitions and a board-ready presentation in 12 weeks.
dualCta.systemsDesc: Systems ships productized agent packages plus custom builds. 4–10 weeks to live, then we run the monthly operations.
dualCta.footer: Not sure? A 30-minute diagnostic call is free — it's not a sales pitch.

serviceRelocate.banner: This service is now part of Leftflow <0>Systems</0>. To see the new package structure and pricing, visit
serviceRelocate.secondary: This service is still active, but Leftflow's new focus is the Advisory and Systems lines. For website or e-commerce projects, <0>get in touch directly</0>.

contactTopics.label: What would you like to discuss?

newContact.heroSubtitle: Our diagnostic calls are not sales pitches. We understand the problem, recommend the right line (Advisory or Systems), and tell you honestly if we're not a fit.

newCases.subtitle: 9 case studies selected from 200+ completed projects. Each one is clearly tagged with the line we used — Advisory, Systems, or both.
newCases.bottomTitle: Is there a case similar to yours?
newCases.bottomDesc: You might have a story like Westwing or YENA. Let's talk in a free 30-minute diagnostic call.

amsterdamTechSection.title: Amsterdam Tech
amsterdamTechSection.lead: In 2026, Leftflow entered a formal strategic partnership with Amsterdam Tech.
amsterdamTechSection.whoBody: Building on 30 years of educational heritage, Amsterdam Tech is a Woolf-accredited EU higher education institution recognized under the Dutch Higher Education Act. With a QS 5★ online rating it is one of the highest-rated online institutions in the world. Programs include BSc Tech Entrepreneurship, BSc AI & ML, and a Tech MBA.
amsterdamTechSection.benefitsTitle: What this partnership brings to Leftflow

benefits.title: Academic quality check
benefits.body: Every Advisory deliverable passes through the Amsterdam Tech academic committee. The logical integrity and strategic coherence of our recommendations are audited with an institutional eye.

benefits.title: EU institutional identity
benefits.body: For enterprise buyers in Turkey and the EU, the Amsterdam Tech link moves Leftflow out of the classic agency market and into the enterprise advisory layer.

benefits.title: Mid-market reach
benefits.body: Amsterdam Tech's alumni network and corporate connections are used as a shared business development channel for Leftflow.

amsterdamTechSection.footer: The partnership is formally structured in Rotterdam and covers both Leftflow's Advisory and Systems lines.

advisoryPage.heroTitle: Get clarity on what to do before you start building.
advisoryPage.heroSubtitle: 3-month fixed-scope strategy packages. We inventory your processes, identify where AI creates real value, and deliver an actionable roadmap with a board-ready presentation. Every deliverable passes Amsterdam Tech academic review.

packages.name: AI Adoption Roadmap
packages.description: Your company's 18-month AI roadmap. Which processes to tackle, which tools to deploy, what the first 3 pilots look like — all scoped and delivered as a fixed engagement.
scope: Current process inventory and technology map
Build vs buy decision — vendor and tool recommendations
packages.fit: 50M+ TL revenue companies looking for a concrete AI starting point

packages.name: Automation Strategy
packages.description: We map where your operational processes bleed time and money. By the end, you'll know exactly which workflows to automate first and what infrastructure to build them on.
scope: ROI calculation and prioritization per process
SaaS vs self-hosted: tool selection decision
Internal team training and handover plan
packages.fit: 10M+ TL revenue companies with highly manual operations

packages.name: Cloud & Data Architecture
packages.description: A plan for moving your data infrastructure to a cloud-native model. AWS / GCP / Azure comparison, security and compliance report, cost model, and migration roadmap.
scope: Data inventory analysis (what data, where, who accesses it)
packages.fit: Data-heavy mid-market / enterprise looking to move off on-prem

short.name: Strategy Workshop
short.description: One-day intensive workshop with your team. We put existing ideas on the table and align priorities together.

short.name: Rapid Diagnostic
short.description: Quick map of current state and highest-ROI opportunities. Short report and recommendation list.

short.name: Mentorship Retainer
short.description: Ongoing strategic sparring partner for CEO and CTO. Weekly calls, interim reviews, support at critical decision points.

approach.title: Diagnostic call (30 min, free)
approach.body: We clarify your problem space together. Which package fits, which doesn't — we'll tell you straight. If we're not a fit, we'll say so.

approach.title: Kickoff and discovery (Week 1-4)
approach.body: Process inventory, stakeholder interviews, first findings. Interim report shared at end of week 4.

approach.title: Strategy and roadmap (Week 5-8)
approach.body: Workshops, decision recommendations, pilot project definitions. Board presentation rehearsal.

approach.title: Delivery and presentation (Week 9-12)
approach.body: Roadmap document, board presentation, and 30-60-90 day action plan delivered.

advisoryPage.hourlyBody: No hourly billing on the Advisory side. Every package has its scope and deliverables defined upfront in writing — if scope expands during the engagement, we re-price together. Package pricing is shared during the diagnostic call; it varies by company size and scope.
advisoryPage.academicBody: Amsterdam Tech (Woolf-accredited, EU higher education institution) audits the logical integrity of strategic recommendations before every Advisory delivery. This partnership is the single feature that separates Leftflow Advisory from classic consulting firms.

faq.q: We're a small business — do these packages fit us?
faq.a: Our main packages are designed for 10M+ TL revenue companies. For smaller teams, the Strategy Workshop (1 day) or Rapid Diagnostic (2 weeks) format is a better fit.

faq.q: Why aren't prices listed on the website?
faq.a: Every package scope varies by company — the same AI Adoption Roadmap is scoped differently for a 40-person firm vs. a 400-person firm. We share custom scope and pricing during the diagnostic call.
We guarantee deliverable scope (documents, presentations, roadmap). Business outcomes depend on execution — strategy matters as much as the team implementing it.

faq.q: What does Amsterdam Tech do here?
faq.a: Every Advisory deliverable passes through the Amsterdam Tech academic committee. Logical integrity, strategy-execution alignment, and argument gaps are audited.
NDA is standard. All data is handled in compliance with KVKK and GDPR. Enterprise customers get custom security protocols.

faq.q: Who implements the strategy once delivered?
faq.a: Two options: your internal team implements it, or you hand it to our Systems line and we implement it. Implementation is not included in the Advisory package.
40% kickoff, 30% midpoint (week 6), 30% final delivery. EUR or TL invoicing, TR and EU bank accounts.

advisoryPage.finalBody: 30 minutes. We clarify the problem space together. We don't have to recommend a package — if we're not a fit, we'll say so honestly. This is a diagnostic call, not a sales pitch.

systemsPage.heroTitle: Production-ready AI agents and automation systems.
systemsPage.heroSubtitle: Battle-tested AI agent packages plus custom builds. We go live in 4–10 weeks, then handle monthly operations and maintenance. Turkish-language ready and KVKK-compliant.
systemsPage.productsTitle: 6 ready-made packages, plus fully custom builds

products.name: Customer Support Agent
products.description: An AI worker that answers customer messages 24/7 across email, live chat, and WhatsApp. Trained on your product knowledge, FAQs, and internal docs; escalates what it can't handle to the right person.
features: Web chat, email, and WhatsApp integration
Response quality dashboard and weekly report

products.name: Sales Outreach Agent
products.description: We define the target customer list together, and the agent enriches it daily, writes personalized outreach messages, and books meetings on your calendar. The same model that generated €65K+ direct revenue in the Westwing project.
features: Apollo, LinkedIn, Sales Navigator data enrichment
A/B testing and weekly pipeline report

products.name: Content Engine Agent
products.description: A content team trained on your brand voice and tone. Produces blog posts, social media content, email campaigns, and video scripts; auto-publishes after your approval flow.
features: Brand tone and style guide training
Blog, LinkedIn, Instagram, X, email formats

products.name: Operations & Accounting Agent
products.description: An AI worker that handles back-office operations: invoices, orders, expenses, inventory. Connects to Logo, Netsis, Mikro, and ERP systems; takes over your team's repetitive manual work.
features: Automated monthly reports and anomaly detection

products.name: Workflow Automation Agent
products.description: We automate the repetitive work flowing between your internal tools. Slack, Notion, Airtable, Google Workspace, HubSpot, Shopify — 300+ tools supported. Add new flows with a short brief.

products.name: Custom AI Build
products.description: For needs that don't fit ready-made packages. Industry-specific agents, enterprise system integration, RAG systems on company documents, fine-tuned models — built from scratch.

systemsPage.retainerBody: Our job doesn't end when setup is done. We keep agents running, update prompts, and add new features. Three retainer tiers available.

retainers.name: STANDARD
items: Basic scope + up to 10 hrs/mo new features

faq.q: Why aren't prices listed on the website?
faq.a: Package pricing varies by company size, existing systems, and integration complexity. We share custom scope and pricing in the discovery call.
Both. 5 ready-made packages (Customer Support, Sales Outreach, Content, Operations, Automation) are customizable; Custom Build is fully bespoke for needs that don't fit.
You, post-delivery. All source code, docs, and deployment config are transferred to your account. No vendor lock-in.
Modal.com is our default infrastructure, but AWS, GCP, Azure, or fully self-hosted deployment is possible. Models are swappable too (Claude, GPT, open-source).
All systems are KVKK and GDPR compliant. EU data residency is standard; on-premises deployment option available for sensitive data.
30-day warranty included. After that: three-tier retainer — Basic 400 EUR/mo, Standard 1,200 EUR/mo, Premium 2,500 EUR/mo.
Less direct in Systems. Amsterdam Tech audits your Advisory roadmap, then Systems executes it. The two lines work together.

systemsPage.finalBody: 45-minute discovery call. We'll scope the technical requirements, integrations, and timeline together. At the end, we share a custom SOW framework.
